use_cases: Play a classic falling-block puzzle game with various tetromino shapes
Track score, lines cleared, and level progression during gameplay
Pause and resume game sessions at any time
Experience keyboard-controlled block movement and rotation
Compete for high scores in a simple, addictive puzzle format
ai_summary: A complete Tetris-style falling block puzzle game featuring all seven classic tetromino shapes with distinct colors. The game includes a scoring system, level progression based on lines cleared, pause functionality, and keyboard controls for movement and rotation. Designed as a fully playable standalone game component suitable for entertainment or casual gaming contexts.
